description: Triggers for building specific resume sections like skills, summary, or education

queries.query: Build a skills section for my software engineer resume
Write a professional summary section for my resume
Create an education section that properly shows my non-traditional background
Build the certifications and awards section for my resume
Help me create a targeted skills section for a data analyst resume
Write a personal statement or headline for the top of my resume
Create a languages and tools section organized by proficiency level
Build a volunteer work and activities section that adds professional value
Create a publications section for a technical resume
Help me write a compelling 3-sentence summary that positions me for director roles
Rewrite my existing resume bullets with stronger action verbs
Tailor my entire resume for this specific job application
Fix the formatting and visual inconsistencies in my resume
Add metrics and quantification to my experience bullets
Optimize my resume for ATS keyword matching
Write an executive-level resume for a VP Engineering role
Manage multiple resume versions for different applications
Create a creative visual resume for my design portfolio
Build a professional reference list
Write a cover letter for this job posting
